## Meeting Purpose

[Sales standup to discuss ongoing deals, upcoming strategy sprints, and team coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ramp deal updated to strategy sprint ($30k for 8 weeks), prioritized for Sept 8th kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Tyler to lead Rimkus deep dive with Kyle's support; prep scheduled for Tuesday 1pm PT](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Tyler taking over Kyle's intro calls; Kyle joining Lovable call with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [HubSpot Inbound conference happy hour (Sept 4th) - team encouraged to attend and invite contacts](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

## Topics

### Deal Updates and Prioritization

  - [Ramp: Updated to strategy sprint ($30k/8 weeks), aiming for Sept 8th kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [High priority due to customer importance and upsell potential](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [Kyle to send agreement today, follow up on procurement](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Rimkus: Deep dive scheduled for Wednesday, CMO + 2 senior stakeholders attending](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Tyler leading, Kyle supporting for first two deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Zapier: Kyle to join due to competitor experience, but limiting involvement](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Logic: Meeting with CEO tomorrow, price-conscious but good potential](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Clarify: Meeting Wednesday with Marcel and marketing leader](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Team Coordination and Workload

  - [Kyle's calendar filling up; team discussing how to prioritize his involvement](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Tyler taking over Kyle's intro calls to free up time](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Kyle's routing percentage for intro calls updated to zero](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Tyler to connect with George for strategy sprint updates, reducing reliance on Marcel's availability](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### HubSpot Inbound Conference (Sept 4th)

  - [Team encouraged to attend happy hour event in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Aiming for 150 attendees; team to start inviting contacts](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Tyler planning to attend Wed-Fri, balancing with upcoming bachelor party](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Discussion on Zoom call appearances and hair maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/2yuwdG-savMyRwbp3B46VyXNwmLwr2Bd?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
